calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-12-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-12-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks:P. Dias/M. Vallejo, CSR: Valerie Papale
Appearances:
Herbert Fong, Plaintiff present with counsel, Susan Parkinson
Barbara Wagner, Evangelina Avenetti and Pattick Washington, Defendants present in pro per.
Parties met in chambers and reached a settlement by stipulation.
Terms of the ORAL settlement were read into the record as follows:
Plaintiff is entitled to a (future) judgment against the defendant for restitution and (immediate) possession of the premises of the property located at:
1100 Leavenworth St. #3, San Francisco, CA. and back rent in the amount of $12,075.00
Forfeiture of the rental agreement.
Security deposit is forfeited.
If the defendant vacates the premises on or before 7/16/03 at 5 P.M., plaintiff waives all back rent, damages and to dismiss the action.
Each party waives claim against the other.
Each to bears its own costs and attorney's fees.
Any items left in the premises will be disposed of.
No one else occupying the premises who claims a right to possession.
If defendant did not comply with the agreement, plaintiff reserves the right to enforce this stipulation and judgment.
Defendant waives any right to any stays of execution.
All parties agreed to the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.
